description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has three jobs: lint, test, and coverage, all running on ubuntu-latest. The lint job sets up Python 3.8, installs dependencies, and runs Flake8 and Mypy. The test job runs on a matrix of Python versions from 3.7 to 3.13, installs dependencies, and runs pytest. The coverage job sets up Python 3.8, installs dependencies including coverage and coveralls, runs pytest with coverage, and uploads the coverage report to Coveralls.
